prompt: Generate a conceptual explanation of 'visual working memory capacity limits' for an undergraduate student. Use these source papers: Luck & Vogel (1997), Cowan (2001), Zhang & Luck (2008). Include both English and Korean versions. The explanation should cover the slot model vs resource model debate.
expected_output_criteria: Follows Conceptual Explanation structure from SKILL.md
One-sentence summary in both EN and KO
Core explanation at undergraduate level: defines terms, uses analogies
Key terms with [Source: Author, Year] citations
Visual analogy or metaphor for capacity limits
Connection to other concepts (attention, neural coding)
Uses TERM_GLOSSARY for Korean translations (시각적 작업 기억, 슬롯 모델, etc.)
All claims traceable to the three source papers
No hallucinated facts beyond source material

prompt: Create a 10-question multiple choice quiz on fMRI methodology for master's level students. Cover topics: BOLD signal, hemodynamic response function, spatial resolution, temporal resolution, preprocessing steps, GLM analysis, and common artifacts. Generate bilingual questions (EN/KO).
expected_output_criteria: 10 questions with 4 options each (A, B, C, D)
Bilingual: q_en, q_ko, options in both languages
Exactly one correct answer per question
Explanations for correct answer AND why each distractor is wrong
Master's level: assumes basic neuroscience, focuses on mechanisms
Covers all 7 specified topics
Distractors are plausible misconceptions, not obviously wrong
Uses TERM_GLOSSARY for Korean fMRI terms (BOLD 신호, etc.)
Output as valid JSON matching quiz schema from SKILL.md

prompt: Generate a concept map for the relationship between attention, working memory, and neural coding. Use these 5 papers from our Zotero collection as source material. Output as JSON with nodes and edges that sci-viz can render as an interactive network diagram.
expected_output_criteria: JSON output with nodes and edges arrays
Nodes have: id, label, definition, papers fields
Edges have: from, to, relationship, evidence fields
Relationship types from SKILL.md vocabulary (causes, correlates_with, is_component_of, etc.)
At least 8 concept nodes spanning all three topics
At least 10 edges showing cross-topic relationships
All definitions and evidence grounded in source papers
Compatible with sci-viz rendering
Includes both English labels and Korean equivalents
